steps.title: Identify the highest bar
steps.content: The question asks for “the highest percentage of lithium recovered.” Looking at all four bars on the graph, the dark bar for Type B (recycling process 2) reaches the highest point on the y-axis.

steps.title: Read the value and select the answer
steps.content: This bar reaches approximately 75% on the lithium recovered scale. The remaining three bars show percentages between 30% and 55%, confirming this is the maximum. A is correct.
